description: Register-driven routing (sipjs sip-front-proxy mimic), realized via the PORTABLE basic-call shape over the fake-register-proxy infra. The layout pre-REGISTERs bob1's AOR (sip:bob1@register.example) and rewrites alice's Request-URI to that AOR with NO X-Api-Call pin (pure SIP routing); the register front proxy resolves the userpart 'bob1' to bob1's registered Contact, decrements Max-Forwards, pushes its Via and record-routes the dialog. So bob1's initial INVITE arrives carrying the AOR userpart, the caller identity and a proxy Record-Route — proving the call reached bob1 purely because bob1 registered, the thing the X-Api-Call convenience hides.
